scripts.build:heroes: node scripts/configure-avenger-heroes.js && node scripts/configure-cosmic-expansion.js && node scripts/configure-street-expansion.js && node scripts/configure-mutant-reserve.js && node scripts/configure-team-synergies.js && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-core-hero-sprites.ps1 && npm run build:atlas && npm run build:data
scripts.build:cosmic: node scripts/configure-cosmic-expansion.js && node scripts/configure-team-synergies.js && npm run build:data
scripts.build:street: node scripts/configure-street-expansion.js && node scripts/configure-team-synergies.js && npm run build:data
scripts.build:mutants: node scripts/configure-mutant-reserve.js && node scripts/configure-team-synergies.js && npm run build:data
scripts.build:items: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-item-icons.ps1 && npm run build:data
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm test && npm run balance && npm run benchmark && npm run audit:a11y && npm run release:check && npm run smoke:browser
